text.title: VUI Market Context Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce a publishable vui_market_brief.json + brief.md.

step.name: collect-target-context
step.input: Product brief naming target geos + primary device type
step.action: Normalise target geos to ISO-3166 codes; select primary metric list (default 4 metrics from this methodology).

step.name: refresh-metrics
step.action: Run `templates/refresh-script.py`. It calls Anthropic with web_search restricted to allowlist hosts and asks for value + year + source_url + geo per metric.
step.decision-gate: If any returned row lacks geo or source_url, retry with stricter prompt; if 2 retries fail, drop that metric and log it.

step.name: normalize-and-tag
step.action: For each row, attach a `denominator` enum value by inspecting `metric` text; reject rows that cannot be classified.

step.name: assemble-brief
step.input: data[], platforms table (this methodology), target geos
step.action: Render `templates/brief.md` with per-geo platform comparison + sourced stats. Include explicit LLM-VUI row.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-vui-market-context.py --file vui_market_brief.json`. Exit 0 = publish; exit 1 = surface violations, fix, retry.
step.decision-gate: If validator emits any VIOLATION line, STOP — do not publish.
